examples: As you get older, you may become long-sighted or shortsighted.
Environmentalists fear that this is a shortsighted approach to the problem of global warming.
Don't be so shortsighted as to see only what is under your nose.
But it would be shortsighted to shoot down the F-22 because of governmental operational deficiencies.
The critics (like this shortsighted one on Seeking Alpha) will slink back into the shadows.
